name: JEPA-LM: Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for Text Compression
blurb: First JEPA for text compression. Reinterprets U-Net transformer as encoder-decoder with 256-dim latent space, next-position predictor (MSE), and SIGReg anti-collapse regularizer. Loss: CE + 0.1*JEPA_MSE + 0.03*SIGReg. LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation. 19M params, 10L/512d. Novel architecture contribution - JEPA components add only ~131K params with zero eval overhead.
author: Daniel Nobrega Medeiros
